author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic/manual relation cleanup prep; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, generated-output edits, durable retirements, replacement submissions, LOG edits, manifest edits, canonical/generated edits, or code edits applied

checkpoint_context.source_triage_recommendation: retire-only data cleanup for operated_by entity->entity; retire sub_9e51ef484cc836e5; no replacement recommended from current evidence
checkpoint_context.not_repeated: This prep uses relation052 as requested and does not repeat relation051 or relation037-relation050.

bucket.name: Access-A-Ride incorrectly modeled as operated_by NYCT
bucket.cleanup_direction: retire-only data cleanup; keep operated_by scoped to project|route|corridor -> entity
bucket.rationale: The accepted relation says Access-A-Ride is operated by NYCT, but its only relation evidence is the agenda heading 'iii. Paratransit Report'. Same-source blocks support an Access-A-Ride entity, paratransit metrics, and provider-category definitions, but not a strong replacement operator edge.

same_source_evidence_reviewed.summary: Agenda heading for the Paratransit Report section; this is the original relation evidence and does not state an operator.
Paratransit Operations monthly service-indicator table; supports paratransit metrics, not an operator relation.
Defines Total Trips for registered Access-A-Ride clients and says ridership is presented by provider type.
Defines provider categories; says primary Access-A-Ride branded vehicles are operated by contractors, which argues against inventing a NYCT operated_by replacement from this source.

no_same_source_valid_replacement_with_su.conclusion: No same-source accepted replacement relation is both endpoint-shape valid and sufficiently source-backed for this cleanup.

current_operated_by_entity_to_entity_inv.endpoint_shape_issue: Relation kind operated_by expects project|route|corridor -> entity, got entity -> entity.

retire_only_semantically_safer_than_inve.reason: The submitted description may reflect broader corpus knowledge, but the cited source block is only a section heading. A replacement such as part_of_agency, operates, related_to, or operated_by would either overstate the source or preserve the same endpoint-shape problem. Retire-only removes the malformed weak assertion while leaving accepted Access-A-Ride, NYCT, paratransit metric, and source-publication records intact.

no_generated_files_edited.note: The shared worktree already contains generated-output and other edits owned by others. This task writes only data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch052-prep.json and does not edit retired.json, submissions, canonical JSONL, materialized data, wiki output, LOG, manifest, code, or generated files.

original.label: Access-A-Ride operated by NYCT

tool_args.label: Access-A-Ride operated by NYCT
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit Report - included in NYCT and Bus Committee Meeting

payload.description: Access-A-Ride paratransit service is operated as part of NYCT

proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch052 retires malformed operated_by entity -> entity relation relation_access-a-ride-operated-by-nyct because the only accepted relation evidence is an agenda heading for the Paratransit Report and same-source inspection found no sufficiently source-backed valid replacement.

original.reason: The relation uses an endpoint shape that is invalid for operated_by and the evidence is too thin to support a durable replacement.

steps: Add the proposed_retired_json_entry for sub_9e51ef484cc836e5 to data/submission-overrides/retired.json.
Do not append a replacement submission journal for batch052.
Do not change relation endpoint-shape rules for operated_by.

local_validation.tooling: Read-only rg/sed/node inspection only; no appendSubmission, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, DB publish, provider-backed command, post-ingest LLM harness, generated-output command, durable data edit, or code edit run.

commands_run: pwd && rg -n "sub_9e51ef484cc836e5|relation051|relation052|operated_by|unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape" data/review_notes data/submissions data/canonical packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts retired.json 2>/dev/null
node read-only check for retired hits of sub_9e51ef484cc836e5
node read-only summary of meeting_doc_91586 submissions involving relations, Access-A-Ride, Paratransit, and NYCT
node read-only summary of canonical meeting_doc_91586 relation records
